arts.sum: The right-back made 319 appearances for City over seven-and-a-half years

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker grateful for Manchester City 'dream' after sealing AC Milan loan move
arts.sum: The right-back departs for Italy until the end of the season after requesting a move away from the club he joined in 2017

arts.ttl: Real Madrid reject chance to sign Man City star
arts.sum: La Liga giants Real Madrid recently rejected the opportunity to bring in Kyle Walker from Manchester City. That’s according to Marca, who have on Friday provided an insight into the…

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: Man City captain Kyle Walker completes AC Milan transfer
arts.sum: Manchester City captain Kyle Walker has joined AC Milan on loan until the end of the season.

arts.ttl: OFFICIAL: AC Milan Sign Kyle Walker
arts.sum: AC Milan have officially announced the loan signing of Kyle Andrew Walker from Manchester City, marking a significant transfer for the Italian club. Walker, a globally recognized right-back, brings a wealth of experience and an impressive trophy cabinet to the Rossoneri. The post OFFICIAL: AC Milan Sign Kyle Walker appeared first on FootItalia.com.

arts.ttl: Man City captain Walker completes AC Milan loan move
arts.sum: Manchester City captain Kyle Walker completes a loan move to Italian club AC Milan.

arts.ttl: Kyle Walker breaks silence on Man City exit in emotional message to fans and wife Annie
arts.sum: Kyle Walker has opened up for the first time about his move to AC Milan as he paid tribute to his teammates in an emotional message
